questions: digital art er jonno ki lage
answers: Digital art is any artistic work created using digital technology — drawing tablets, software like Procreate or Photoshop, and computers. It includes illustration, painting, 3D art, pixel art, and more.
Digital art holo computer ba tablet diye art create kora. Drawing tablet ar software use kore painting, illustration, concept art shob banano jay. Undo button ache tai shekha easy!

For digital art, you need a drawing tablet (Wacom, XP-Pen, or iPad with Apple Pencil) and software like Procreate, Clip Studio Paint, Krita (free), or Photoshop. Start with fundamentals like anatomy and perspective.

Digital art offers infinite undo, layers, brushes, and easy color changes. Popular tools include Procreate (iPad), Clip Studio Paint (all platforms), and Krita (free). Practice fundamentals — they matter more than tools.
